title: Luna, the Black Witch
overview: A young witch living deep in the forest occasionally visits a nearby town to sell her medicines and buy books.

title: The Destined One
overview: Enchanted with the charming boy she saw in town, Luna draws a magical picture and falls into a forbidden love.

title: The Cursed Youngling
overview: Luna and Claude rescue an injured boy from the river before realizing that his body holds a terrible secret.

title: The Black Witch Council
overview: Luna pleads with the black witches for a chance to raise the boy and teach him magic so he can avoid his fate.

title: I Cannot Return to the Cat Forest
overview: Luna remembers her times with the Cat Witch, a troubled girl who helped open Luna's eyes to new experiences.

title: The First Day
overview: When Claude notices Lize struggling with his magic studies, he scolds Luna for being too lenient with the boy.

title: The Magic Diary
overview: Although he does not fully understand what purpose it serves, Lize tries to learn how to use his magic diary.

title: The White Witch and the Black Witch
overview: Lize worries about Luna's trouble in the kitchen and becomes frustrated with his own inability to learn magic.

title: The House in the Black Forest
overview: After learning how to make tear tea, Lize is sent to town and encounters unusual poison creatures on the way.

title: Reunion
overview: With rumors of unrest in the air, Luna returns to town and has a chance encounter with a person from her past.

title: The Councilor
overview: The Wind Magician tracks Luna and Lize down and prepares to give the boy a crucial test to determine his fate.

title: Lize, the Black Witch's Apprentice
overview: The Wind Magician takes Lize aside for a heart-to-heart chat before deciding the fate of the cursed youngling.
